entries.title: v1.0.0 released 🚀
entries.body: First stable release. Brands Logo ships with 15,000+ SVG logos on the web, a public assets/logos.json manifest, a published Figma plugin (insert, replace-in-place, resize, two libraries), light/dark/device themes, keyboard shortcuts, PWA install, and a daily auto-sync that keeps the collection fresh.

entries.title: Figma plugin is live 🎉
entries.body: Brands Logo is now published on the Figma Community — search, insert, replace and resize 15,000+ logos right inside Figma. Install it from the header button or figma.com/community/plugin/1649190957969710872.

entries.title: Export sizes + keyboard shortcuts
entries.body: Pick an export size for copied/downloaded SVGs from the toolbar (incl. Custom). Press ? to see all shortcuts — F install, N notifications, G GitHub, L/D/D-D themes, Shift+H/D/U to navigate. Shift-click a copy button still grabs the raw SVG instantly, now with a toast.

entries.title: Figma plugin launched
entries.body: Search, insert, replace-in-place and resize 15,000+ logos without leaving Figma. The plugin syncs live from this repo, so new logos show up automatically.

entries.title: Docs & Updates pages
entries.body: A new Docs page explains the website, the API manifest and the Figma plugin. This Updates page (and the bell) now tracks what's new.

entries.title: Public logo manifest
entries.body: assets/logos.json now lists every logo with its category — a tiny JSON API you can build on. It's regenerated on every build.

entries.title: Football crests refreshed
entries.body: Replaced outdated club crests with current official versions and added more clubs and competitions.

entries.title: Library cleanup
entries.body: Pruned bloated and incorrect files and re-sourced clean, optimized SVGs across the collection.
